entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: Wani bayyananne front that asks one ra’ayi.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Wani na kowa tarko that warns against a likely kuskure.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Wani concise back that completes the thought.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Wani alama that helps ba tare da giving everything away.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: Wani bita choice don haka missed katuna return sooner.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: Wani mai sauƙi katin tunatarwa tsarin aiki

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: Wani stronger card asks don tunawa:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Wani mai amfani card asks one thing. It bai kamata ya ɓoye five tambayoyi inside one saƙo. It ya kamata be specific enough don amsa, amma not don haka narrow that it becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Wani weak AI katin tunatarwa says:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: tunanin da ake yi da gangan (active recall)

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add alamomi ba tare da giving away the amsa

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI zai iya taimakawa sa katunan tunatarwa sauri, amma the learning still yana zuwa daga retrieval. If the kayan aiki writes the katuna da the mai koyo never struggles don amsa su, almost nothing has changed. mai amfani version turns messy bayanai zuwa mai mayar da hankali saƙonni, sannan makes the mai koyo tunawa kafin revealing the amsa.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI can turn rough bayanai zuwa cleaner retrieval saƙonni. It can split broad ideas zuwa ƙarami katuna, add examples, da identify traps a mai koyo might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI katunan tunatarwa da tunawa mai aiki: yadda don tuna ƙarin

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply a ra’ayi don a small example.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Nemi one-ra’ayi katuna tare da alamomi da na kowa traps.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces ƙwaƙwalwa don reconstruct the amsa bayan some forgetting, wacce strengthens daga baya tunawa."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: kwatanta two ideas;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: ayyana a kalma;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Delete katuna that suna too broad ko obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Kada a bita everything equally

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Mai sauƙi. Tura shi daga baya.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: bayyana a cause;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa suna one na the simplest ways don do this.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa suna powerful, amma su ba su the whole karatu process. su suna mafi kyau don retrieval, kalmomi, definitions, formulas, distinctions, da muhimmi examples. su suna weaker lokacin da the mai koyo has never understood the ra’ayi a cikin the farko place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa work mafi kyau lokacin da su gwada one ra’ayi at a lokaci, reveal amsoshi only bayan effort, da bita missed katuna sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Don a zurfafa hanya, karanta the katin tunatarwa mai gina jagora da the katin tunatarwa mai gina saƙonni da madaukin karatu. goal ba a beautiful deck. goal shi ne remembering ƙarin lokacin da the bayanai suna gone.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Don example:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front: "me ya sa does bita da tazara work mafi kyau fiye da cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Hard. bita bayan a gajere delay.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Alama: "Think game da forgetting da retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Alamomi suna mai amfani lokacin da su preserve effort. Wani bad alama shi ne the amsa a cikin disguise. Wani good alama narrows the bincike space.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify a na kowa kuskure;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If a card keeps failing, kada a only repeat it. tambaya me ya sa Shi ne hard. amfani da Socratic Instruction don uncover the rashin fahimta, lissafi mataki koci don procedural gaps, ko the koyon AI dakin karatun saƙonni don find a mafi kyau karatu saƙo.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's katin tunatarwa mai gina shi ne designed a kusa da that tunawa mai aiki madauki: gina a deck, gwada the front, reveal the amsa, kimanta naka tunawa, da bita the misses until the ra’ayi sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. bita soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: One kuskure masu koyo sa shi ne treating kowane card the same. If kai know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow na iya waste lokaci. If kai miss a card, waiting a week na iya be too long.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Pair katunan tunatarwa tare da fahimta

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste a small chunk na bayanai zuwa katin tunatarwa mai gina.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: the process plants amfani da don sa food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Kimanta tunawa da gaskiya.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Karatu bayanai feels productive. Remembering su daga baya shi ne the real gwada.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: tuna a sequence;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Bita ba tare da looking at the back.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Katuna masu ƙarfi sau da yawa suna haɗa da:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: dabarun karatu

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Wannan alama helps the mai koyo fara ba tare da removing the act na remembering. inspir's katin tunatarwa mai gina shi ne designed don this reveal-da-kimanta madauki: gwada farko, reveal second, kimanta da gaskiya, sannan bring weak katuna back sooner.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa tunawa mai aiki yana da muhimmanci. maimakon looking at the amsa, kai gwada don pull it daga ƙwaƙwalwa. effort strengthens the ƙwaƙwalwa da reveals abin da still yana buƙatar work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Mai koyo still has don do the remembering. Wannan shi ne the point.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Second card makes the mai koyo retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good katuna usually mayar da hankali a kan one na these jobs:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Wannan ba ya buƙata don be complicated. important part shi ne that naka bita jadawali responds don ƙwaƙwalwa maimakon treating the deck like a static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Gwada it a cikin katin tunatarwa mai gina. If kai buƙata don fahimci the batu kafin making katuna, fara a cikin koyi Anything. If kai want pressure bayan reviewing katuna, move zuwa tambayoyi Me a kan Trivia ko Viva atisaye.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Turn bayanai zuwa mafi kyau katuna

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Turn repeated misses zuwa a tambaya don koyi Anything.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Amfani da this madauki:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Amfani da three ratings:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Abin da shi ne the role na chlorophyll a cikin photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Abin da makes a good katin tunatarwa

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Lokacin da kai paste bayanai zuwa AI, tambaya it don split broad ideas zuwa those jobs. Wani deck tare da 18 specific katuna shi ne usually mafi kyau fiye da a deck tare da 5 giant katuna that each contain a whole paragraph.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: Inda AI helps
